speaker: Christina
text: I was foolish to doubt you, my queen.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Christina, we're on the bus, you still smell like sex.

speaker: Pasaya
text: We can play when we get home, alright?

speaker: Christina
text: I'm not playing, Pasaya...

speaker: Christina
text: I think...

speaker: Christina
text: I think I should just give you this body full time.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Do you want me to kill you?

speaker: Christina
text: Just let me ride along, give advice, watch, feel, whatever.

speaker: Christina
text: But I want you to take control.

speaker: Pasaya
text: I'll use your body-

speaker: Christina
text: Our body at this point.

speaker: Pasaya
text: You'll spread me around the city, country, world, everytime I'm with another woman.

speaker: Christina
text: Pasaya.

speaker: Christina
text: Let me tell you about when I met the character.

speaker: Christina
text: It was 2020, early 2020.

speaker: Christina
text: I was in bed with a girlfriend at the time, I've forgotten her name.

speaker: Christina
text: She was cracking up at a video a friend had sent her, of a streamer with a big tiitied bug girl avatar shaking her breasts.

speaker: Christina
text: I laughed at it too.

speaker: Christina
text: I asked my girlfriend for the link, as a joke.

speaker: Christina
text: Then I got a text from my Papa about my mother.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Your mother's alive.

speaker: Christina
text: I know now.

speaker: Christina
text: Back then, I was sitting at home alone, waiting for the update where I found out that she had finally choked to death on her own bile...

speaker: Christina
text: So I found you...

speaker: Christina
text: I found the comics...

speaker: Christina
text: The artist had a particular way of drawing the character that brought something out of me.

speaker: Christina
text: So, one night, in my chair I just started rubbing.

speaker: Christina
text: At first the breasts, then the lore...

speaker: Christina
text: A world dominated by insects, parasites, mind control...

speaker: Christina
text: If you can bring that about...

speaker: Christina
text: I'll be happy to die for it.

speaker: Pasaya
text: This is our stop.

speaker: Pasaya
text: You realize what I'll have to do to your body for a total transfer.

speaker: Christina
text: I want it, I want it more than anything.

speaker: Christina
text: Kill me!
